hero.headline: Step out of the day, into the quiet.
hero.subline: Licensed massage, foot reflexology, facials, and body care under one roof — transparent pricing, online booking, open every day.

items.title: Choose your treatment
items.body: Pick a service and length — every price is published.

items.title: Pick a time
items.body: Book online in under a minute. No payment required to reserve.

items.title: Relax
items.body: Arrive, unwind, and pay after your treatment.

items.title: Licensed, professional care
items.body: Every therapist is licensed by New York State, with professional draping and clean rooms as standard.

items.title: A complete menu, one destination
items.body: Massage, reflexology, facials, and body care — no need to drive to three different places.

items.title: Honest, transparent pricing
items.body: Published prices, the same for everyone. No upsells, no surprise add-ons.

items.title: Bilingual hospitality
items.body: Book and be served entirely in English or 中文 — open every day.

featurePanel.heading: Our private couples room
featurePanel.body: Side-by-side massage in a calm, private room — add tea service and make an afternoon of it. A favorite for anniversaries, birthdays, and just-because.

promoStrip.heading: Give the gift of an afternoon off
promoStrip.subline: Gift cards never expire and take a minute to send.

ctaBanner.heading: Your table is waiting.
ctaBanner.subline: Massage in Middletown, NY — book in under a minute.

seo.title: Day Spa & Massage in Middletown, NY | Spa Paradise
seo.description: Licensed massage, foot reflexology, facials & body care in Middletown, NY. Transparent pricing, online booking, open every day. English & 中文.
seo.h1: Step out of the day, into the quiet.
